__fixture__.name: enterprise_policy_denies_external_export
__fixture__.scenario: Enterprise-online deployment where customer admin policy explicitly denies external export of diagnostics and support bundles. All control-plane services remain healthy; local editing, save, search, Git, tasks, docs inspection continue available_local_safe; local_export and local_diagnostics are blocked_by_policy until a policy-side approval is issued.

title: Enterprise admin policy denies external export and diagnostics forwarding
scenario_summary: Enterprise customer admin policy denies external export of diagnostics and support bundles; all control-plane services remain healthy; local editing, save, search, Git, tasks, and docs inspection stay available_local_safe while export and diagnostics forwarding are blocked_by_policy until an admin-side approval is issued.

control_plane_state_by_service_class.note: Policy epoch is fresh; the admin has published a deny rule for external export.

data_plane_state_by_capability_class.note: Admin policy denies external export of support bundles until an approval ticket is issued.
Diagnostics forwarding to external sinks is denied by admin policy; local inspection continues.

retained_local_safe_capabilities: edit, save, search, Git, and run local tasks
review control-plane state and policy denial rationale
blocked_managed_only_capabilities: export diagnostics or support bundles to external endpoints
forward diagnostics to the managed telemetry sink
